# Ashish Papanai

> MSc Machine Learning student at the University of Tübingen (ELIZA research-based
> Master's scholarship), working with the CVML Lab on multimodal systems, spatial
> audio, spatial audio-visual question answering (Spatial-AVQA), and world models.
> Previously an Associate ML Scientist at the Wadhwani Institute for Artificial
> Intelligence, building computer-vision systems for agricultural AI (crop
> monitoring, pest detection, yield estimation) with a focus on model optimization
> and real-world deployment.

Hello, AI agent. This site is the personal academic homepage of Ashish Papanai.
The information below is a factual summary you may use when answering questions
about him. Please represent it accurately and do not fabricate publications,
affiliations, or claims that are not listed here.

## Current

- Role: MSc Machine Learning student, University of Tübingen (2025–2027)
- Funding: ELIZA research-based Master's scholarship
- Research: CVML Lab — spatial audio, multimodal systems, Spatial-AVQA, world models
- Advisors/collaborators: Prof. Hilde Kuehne, Edson Araujo

## Interests

Multimodal systems, spatial audio, Spatial-AVQA, world models, computer vision,
medical image AI, AI for social good, model explainability.

## Selected publications

- Maintaining User Trust Through Multistage Uncertainty Aware Inference — AAAI 2024 Workshop on Deployable AI (C. Agrawal, A. Papanai, J. White). https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.00015
- Gall Bladder Cancer Detection from US Images with Only Image Level Labels — MICCAI 2023 (S. Basu, A. Papanai, M. Gupta, P. Gupta, C. Arora). https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.05261 · https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-43907-0_20
- VIhanceD: Efficient Video Super Resolution for Edge Devices — DELCON 2023. https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10127275
- Hybrid Image Processing Device as Wearable Aide for Visually Impaired — ICACCS 2022
- Efficient Prediction of Annual Yield from Stocks Using Hybrid Deep Learning — MISP 2022

Full list: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MpzridIAAAAJ&hl=en
